# Golden Eval Test Fixtures

Synthetic test fixtures for regression testing the eval system.

- `book2_section_all_pass.json` — Section that should pass all deterministic assertions
- `book2_section_glossary.json` — Glossary section testing section-type thresholds
- `book2_section_paraphrased_quote.json` — Section with paraphrased quote
- `book2_section_hallucination.json` — Section with cross-chapter reference (tests cumulative context)
